Fitness Week 2025 is just around the corner — are YOU ready to take on the challenge? 🔥

Happening on 29th & 30th April at CLC, MMU Melaka from 10 AM to 4 PM, this is your chance to jump into action — no gym membership required! Whether you’re a gym regular or just curious to give it a go, everyone is welcome to join in the fun.

We’ve got a lineup of exciting challenges that will push your limits, test your strength, and give you the chance to win cash prizes and rewards. And if you’re just here for the vibes, come cheer on your friends and enjoy the atmosphere!

Bring your energy, your friends, and your best effort. No matter your fitness level, this event is all about having a good time and pushing yourself.

Mark your calendars:
Date: 29–30 April 2025
Time: 10 AM – 4 PM
Venue: CLC, MMU Melaka

For any inquiries, feel free to contact:
Amreesh (President): +60 14-302 2209
Fan Jin Xuan (Vice President): +60 12-378 6166

Flex & Fitness Club 2024/2025

🚨 FFC Sub-Com Recruitment is NOW OPEN! 🚨

Are you ready to flex more than just your muscles? It’s time to channel your passion, creativity, and teamwork into action! 🔥

We’re on the lookout for enthusiastic, dedicated, and energetic individuals who are eager to learn, grow, and make an impact with us throughout the 2025/2026 term! 🌈

Divisions Available
🎨 Creative & Design – Turn ideas into eye-catching visuals and engaging content
⚙️ Operation & Logistic – Keep our events running smoothly behind the scenes
📢 Publicity & Marketing – Spread the word and keep the hype alive

📅 Deadline: 14 November 2025 (Friday), 11:59 PM

📲 Scan the QR code to apply now and flex your skills with FFC!

Fitness Week 2025 — it’s a wrap!

From intense challenges to unforgettable moments, we’ve officially closed the curtain on one of the most exciting weeks of the year. Huge thanks to every participant and committee member who made this event possible — your energy, dedication, and passion truly brought Fitness Week to life!

We hope you had as much fun as we did watching you break records, push your limits, and create memories that’ll last long after the sweat dries. Whether you conquered the One-time Carry or came just to vibe and support your friends, you were part of something incredible.

Are you ready to test your strength, stamina, and spirit? Here’s what‘s coming your way:

Bench Press Challenge
Let’s see how many reps you’ve got in the tank! You’ll be bench pressing 75% of your body weight. Complete more than 10 reps and earn RM1 for every rep after that. Push your limits, rep by rep, and turn your strength into cash!

Fitness Week 2025 – Thank You for the Grind!

Fitness Week has officially come to an end, and what a week it was! From intense challenges to unforgettable moments, everyone gave their all and truly embraced the spirit of pushing past limits.

We witnessed amazing strength, solid teamwork, and plenty of personal breakthroughs. Whether you joined for fun, fitness, or fierce competition — you made it count.

More than RM1200 in cash prizes will be awarded to the top challengers who stood out above the rest. Stay tuned — winner announcement coming in the next post!

🏋‍♂ Fitness Week Challenge Line-Up! 🏋‍♀
Are you ready to test your strength, stamina, and spirit? 

777 Challenge
Teamwork meets surprise in the 777 Challenge! Participants will register individually and be randomly grouped into teams of 5. Using 75% of your body weight, the team member who performs the most reps will walk away with a RM35 cash prize. Who will rise above the rest? Let’s find out!

🏋️‍♂️ Fitness Week Challenge Line-Up! 🏋️‍♀️
Are you ready to test your strength, stamina, and spirit? Here’s what’s coming your way:

Single Arm Dumbbell Challenge 🔥
Test your grip strength and raw power! For the ranking portion, males will lift 60kg and females 25kg. Then, take on the one-time carry challenge with 80kg for males and 40kg for females — you’ll get two attempts to prove your strength. Are you ready to dominate this challenge?

For any inquiries, feel free to contact:
Amreesh (President): +60 14-302 2209
Fan Jin Xuan (Vice President): +60 12-378 6166

	2.	Like this video & share it to your IG Story
	3.	Tag 3 MMU friends in the comments 
	4.	DM us a screenshot of your story (If you can’t send the picture, just say hi first — once we accept your message, you should be able to send it)

The giveaway ends on 3 May 2025 at 11:59PM, and we’ll announce the winners (one from each student ambassador’s video) on 4 May 2025 at 8PM. Good luck everyone🥳

Single Arm Dumbbell Challenge (Male Category) Winners🔥

Strength isn’t just about how much you can lift — it’s about mindset, discipline, and the drive to overcome every obstacle in your way. In our Single Arm Dumbbell Challenge, the male participants went head-to-head in a true test of grit and power. Only one arm, one shot — and no room for excuses.

After an intense battle, three individuals rose above the rest, proving that determination and mental toughness are just as important as physical strength. They’ve earned not just their rankings, but the respect of everyone who witnessed their performance.

Champion: Poh Ching Xiang
1st Runner-Up: Melvin
2nd Runner-Up: Salendran

For any inquiries, feel free to contact:

Greeting from MMU Flex & Fitness Club (FFC).

🏋🏼 Its time to sweat it out with Flex & Fitness Club‼️

MMU Flex & Fitness Club (FFC) is where every fitness journey begins! 💪✨ Whether you’re lifting, sweating, or smiling through a workout, we are here to help you to reach new heights. With our friendly community that cheers you on every step of the way, you‘re not just working out—you’re making fitness fun! 🎉🏋️‍♂️ Join the FFC family today and let‘s crush those goals together! 🙌🔥

🦾Come find us at CSRW booth and start your healthy lifestyle with us!

Thank you and see you soon.

We would like to express gratitude to our members who joined our club. We always welcome new members to the club, and are pleased to have you with us. Feel free to ask for help from our committees if facing any problems in the gym. 

To have a good and healthy body shape, there's no shortcuts for it. It requires hard work and consistency. 

Let's train together cause NO PAIN NO GAIN !
